---
title: "Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD 2022: Final Papers"
description: "DI-2022 final paper versions posted; see you August 14 in DC."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-06"
categories: [NLP, NLU, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2022 @ KDD 2022. Image from [DI workshop](https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Update on the 3rd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2022 (DI-2022): final versions of the accepted papers posted! See you 8-12pm on August 14 in Washington DC!

Thank you our authors: Assaf Arbelle, Ophir Azulai, Udi Barzelay, Debraj Basu, Jasmina Bogojeska, Eric Bunch, Yavgeny Burshtein, Emad Elwany, Marcelo Feighelstein, Glenn Fung, Benjamin Han, Sidra Hanif, Allison Hegel, Meng Jiang, Mukul Kumar, Jonas Kuhn, Leonid Karlinsky, Longin Jan Latecki, Meghanath Macha, Jaya Krishna Mandivarapu, David Montero Martín, Oshri Naparstek, Deepak Pai, Daniel Rotman, Anika Schumann, Joseph Shtok, Peter W. J. Staar, Simon Tannert, Lesly Miculicich Werlen, Javier Yebes, Mengxia Yu, Wenhao Yu.

* DI-2022 Papers: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/papers/>
* DI-2022 Program: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/program/>
* DI-2022 website: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/>

* Program Committee Chair: Ani Nenkova (Adobe)
* Organizing committee: Doug Burdick (IBM Research), Benjamin Han (Microsoft), Dave Lewis (Redgrave Data), Sandeep Tata (Google), and Dan Tecuci (EY).

* Previous year (DI-2021): <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_kdd2022-documentintelligence-nlp-activity-6961774042953523200-jjch).*
